prompt: Logo design on pure white (#FFFFFF) background. A perfect circle with a thick yellow (#FAFA00) border ring (about 5% of diameter thickness). Inside the circle is white. In the center, the letters 'MM' in bold black (#000000) uppercase. CRITICAL: The typeface must be a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold or Eurostile Bold Extended — wide letterforms, thick rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, minimal counter space. No other text, no tagline. Just the yellow ring circle with blocky MM in black inside on white background. Clean vector quality, perfectly centered, razor sharp edges, flat design.
negative_prompt: black background, dark background, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif font, script font, thin lines, rounded font, soft font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, tagline, extra text, grunge, noise, texture, multiple fonts, mixed typefaces
